nasb.text: The earth has quaked at the noise of their downfall. There is an outcry! The noise of it has been heard at the Red Sea.

esv.text: At the sound of their fall the earth shall tremble; the sound of their cry shall be heard at the Red Sea.

cnv.text: 因他們倒下的響聲，地就震動；並且有哀叫的聲音，在紅海那裡也聽得到。

ccb.text: 以东倾覆的声音震动大地，哭喊声直传到红海。
